title: xyris guillenii
intro: Xyris guillenii, also known as the Yellow Eyebrow Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, Xyris guillenii is often used in infusions, teas, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
